pages.title: Low-tier alloys
pages.text: Mixed in the TC3 smeltery from base metals and common vanilla fluids:$(br2)$(item)Terrax$(), $(item)Triberium$(), $(item)Fractum$(), $(item)Violium$(), $(item)Proxii$(), $(item)Tritonite$(), $(item)Ignitz$(), $(item)Imperomite$().

pages.title: High-tier alloys
pages.text: $(item)Yrdeen$(), $(item)Iox$(), $(item)Nucleum$(), $(item)Dyonite$(), $(item)Nitronite$().$(br2)These are the endgame TC3 materials — expensive but unique trait combinations. Consult JEI for the exact inputs and ratios.
